title: Review of salary requirements
body: "This review was commissioned by the Home Secretary in July 2025. It considers:   what should the general salary threshold be for the Skilled Worker route? should there continue to be different salary thresholds for Health and Care Worker visas and the Global Business Mobility and Scale-up routes and, if so, what should these be? what, if any, discounts should apply to salary requirements? should there be any changes to the current approach to occupational going rates? how frequently should salary requirements be updated?  "
